description:
Want to build an Instagram carousel factory? Kevin walks us through fully automated Instagram carousels and TikTok slideshows for three industries — real estate, life coaching, and restaurants — using Blotato + n8n + Make.com.

Drop one keyword into one note ("real estate", "life coach", or "restaurant") and the same workflow flips to that industry. Want it to work for plumbers, accountants, influencers, or AI educators? Same keyword pattern, same template. We show two implementations side-by-side: one in Make.com (using the iterator/aggregator pattern) and one in n8n (using a smart wait-loop that beats the fixed-sleep approach for long renders).

INSIDE THE BUILD
• Blotato's "Create a Visual" module — templates, fonts, profile images, call-to-action buttons, custom images
• Two generation modes — slide-by-slide config vs hands-off prompt mode
• OpenAI auto-prompting — writing the prompt that writes the carousel prompt
• Airtable record aggregation so every generated image lands in the same row
• Make.com's 60-second sleep module vs n8n's 5-second polling wait-loop (huge advantage when you scale to 5–10 minute video renders)
• Three template styles demoed: billboard infographic, steampunk infographic, minimalistic slideshow

WHO THIS IS FOR
Anyone running content at scale — small business owners, influencers, AI educators, real estate agents, life coaches, restaurant owners, plumbers, accountants.

TOOLS USED
Blotato — AI carousel + visual generation
n8n — wait-loop automation flavour
Make.com — iterator/aggregator automation flavour
OpenAI — prompt writing
Airtable — content storage and industry tagging

BEGINNER TIP FROM KEVIN
Don't over-engineer your prompt. Give Blotato an idea and let it do the heavy lifting. Same with OpenAI — feed it your business context and let it write the carousel prompt for you. Nine times out of ten it just works on the first try.

BONUS — AUTO-POST IT
Once the carousel is generated, you can post it directly to Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Facebook, or LinkedIn by adding ONE more node: Blotato's "Create Post". We've covered the post side in past videos.

CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro: Auto-Generate Instagram Carousels for 3 Industries
00:25 Meet Kevin (AI Automations from Malta)
00:48 Make.com vs n8n: Quick Compare
01:07 Importing the Make.com Blueprint

02:02 How the Airtable Record Gets Built
02:25 Inside Blotato's "Create a Visual" Module
02:43 Real Estate Output: 5 Homebuyer Mistakes
03:51 Works for Plumbers, Accountants, Influencers, AI Educators
04:13 Blotato Template Tour
04:35 Slide-by-Slide vs Prompt-Based Generation
04:58 Using OpenAI to Auto-Write the Prompt
05:37 Adding Business Context to the Prompt
06:28 OpenAI's Output for the Life Coach Carousel
06:54 The Airtable Aggregator Module Explained
07:22 Optional: Auto-Post to Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Facebook, LinkedIn
07:52 Life Coach Carousel Output
08:18 Restaurant Run with Custom Image
09:09 Restaurant Output: 5 Menus to Try Tonight
10:14 Switching to n8n
10:44 n8n's Wait Loop vs Make.com's Sleep Module
11:34 Real Estate Run in n8n
12:01 Why the Wait Loop Wins for Long Renders
12:41 n8n Output: Billboard-Style Infographic
13:42 Life Coach Run: Steampunk Infographic
14:07 Wait Time Recommendation (~1 minute)
14:53 Restaurant n8n Output (Minimalistic Slideshow)
15:45 How Blotato Maps Your Prompt to a Template
16:25 Template Range: Elegant to Minimal
17:04 Beginner Tip: Don't Over-Engineer the Prompt
17:25 Wrap-Up + Download Templates
18:01 Bonus: Auto-Post via Blotato Create Post Node

ALTERNATIVE TITLES FOR THE ALGO
Stop Making Instagram Carousels Manually — Blotato + n8n + Make.com Tutorial
I Automated Instagram Carousels for 3 Industries with Blotato (n8n & Make.com)
Realtors: Auto-Generate Instagram Carousels with Blotato (n8n + Make.com)
The Blotato Stack That Makes Instagram Carousels For You (n8n + Make.com)
Build an Instagram Carousel Factory with Blotato + n8n + Make.com

#ai #claude #chatgpt
--

I'm Sabrina Ramonov. I'm on a mission to teach 1 million people AI. I'm also the solo founder of Blotato.com. It's a SaaS app for creators/entrepreneurs to go viral faster with AI, just like me (0 to 500k+ in 6 months solo).


Today: Started https://Blotato.com to distribute 100+ pieces of content per week. 1000s of creators & entrepreneurs use Blotato to go viral faster with AI.

Get FREE AI prompts, playbooks, and agents 👉 https://sabrina.dev/p/free
